scripts.e2e:matrix: pnpm run e2e:policy && playwright test e2e/mode-matrix.spec.ts
scripts.py:compile: UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT=venv uv run python -m compileall confab tests
scripts.py:lint: UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT=venv uv run ruff check confab tests
scripts.py:type: UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT=venv uv run pyright confab/config confab/providers confab/services confab/core.py
scripts.py:quality: pnpm run py:compile && pnpm run py:lint && pnpm run py:type
scripts.check:frontend: pnpm run typecheck:frontend && pnpm run build:frontend
